title: Cozy Living Room Corner with Warm Textures and Personalized Decor
description: Vertical view of a cozy living room corner featuring a comfortable armchair draped with a textured blanket and a patterned pillow. The scene includes a wooden side table with a ceramic lamp, books, a small plant, and decorative sculpture. Behind the chair, a wooden bookshelf holds books, framed botanical prints, a lit candle, and a trailing green plant. The warm color palette and soft ambient lighting create an inviting and personalized interior design aesthetic.
